content: And so I yielded, though still reluctant.

content: 'Come away, Madame,' I said, growing frightened, and feeling that if I were once, by any accident, to give way to the panic that was gathering round me, I should instantaneously lose all control of myself.

content: 'Quite well, I believe,' answered the housekeeper, drily.
